current_steps: Requester emails procurement with supplier details and attachments.
Procurement checks whether the supplier already exists, then copies details into Excel.
Procurement asks finance to validate bank details.
If the expected annual spend is high, head of department approval is requested.
Missing information is chased by email.
Once everything is approved, operations creates the supplier in the internal purchasing system.
Procurement sends a confirmation email back to the requester.
desired_steps: A requester completes a structured form and uploads supporting documents.
A central record is created automatically.
Higher-value suppliers are routed for additional approval.
The requester should receive status updates at key stages.
Approved suppliers should be passed to the internal purchasing team with a clear action list.
Rejected or incomplete requests should be returned with reasons and be resubmittable.
notifications: Requester should receive confirmation on submission.
Update when the request moves to finance review.
Update if more information is needed.
Confirmation when the supplier has been created.
business_rules: Suppliers expected to exceed 10000 annual spend require head of department approval.
Bank details must be verified by finance before activation.
If mandatory documents are missing, the request must be returned to the requester.
If a possible duplicate supplier is detected, procurement must review before the workflow can continue.
Requests should not progress to final creation until all mandatory approvals are complete.
exceptions_and_rework: Requests may need to be reopened or corrected if something goes wrong later.
success_measures: Make it easy to report on bottlenecks and average completion time.
workflow_analysis.volume: 15 to 25 supplier requests per week, with occasional bursts at month end
assumptions: Assume SharePoint unless otherwise specified for intermediate storage.

key_prerequisites: SharePoint site and list location confirmed.
Microsoft Forms creation permission granted to procurement team.
Power Automate environment access for all teams ensured.
implementation_outline: Requester completes a structured form and uploads supporting documents using Microsoft Forms.
A central record is created automatically in SharePoint list upon submission through Power Automate flow.
Procurement team reviews the request, validates supplier details against existing records to avoid duplicates.
review_reasons: Complex routing and approvals required due to multiple actors involved in different stages of review.
Business rules complexity involving financial validation by finance team before supplier activation.
Potential for missing information or incomplete documents requiring reopening requests.
